name: flashvis
description: Watch real flash filesystems work: FS-to-WASM over an emulated NOR chip.

scripts.build: npm run build:fastffs && npm run build:littlefs
scripts.test: npm run test:fastffs && npm run test:integrity && npm run test:console && npm run test:domsmoke && npm run test:littlefs && npm run test:littlefs-integrity
scripts.ci: npm run build:fastffs && npm run build:littlefs && npm test
